title: The Dark Knight
description: A vigilante Batman fights the Joker who plans to bring chaos to Gotham City in a battle of wills and morality.

title: Inception
description: A thief who enters people's dreams to steal secrets is given the task of planting an idea instead.

title: Interstellar
description: A group of astronauts travel through a wormhole near Saturn to find a new home for humanity as Earth dies.

title: The Matrix
description: A hacker discovers that reality is a simulation and joins a rebellion against the machines that control humanity.

title: Pulp Fiction
description: Interconnected stories of crime and redemption follow hitmen philosophical conversations and a mysterious briefcase.

title: Forrest Gump
description: A man with low IQ accidentally influences several historical events while looking for his childhood sweetheart.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
description: A banker is sentenced to life in Shawshank prison and finds hope through the friendship of a fellow inmate.

title: Goodfellas
description: The story of Henry Hill and his rise and fall in the mob highlighting the seductive appeal of gangster life.

title: Fight Club
description: An insomniac office worker forms an underground fight club with a soap salesman that evolves into something more sinister.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
description: An FBI trainee seeks the help of imprisoned cannibalistic killer Hannibal Lecter to catch another serial killer.

title: Avengers Endgame
description: The Avengers assemble one last time to undo the damage caused by Thanos and restore balance to the universe.

title: Spider-Man No Way Home
description: Peter Parker seeks help from Doctor Strange to make people forget he is Spider-Man but the spell goes wrong.

title: The Prestige
description: Two rival magicians in 19th century London obsessively compete to create the ultimate illusion at great personal cost.

title: Memento
description: A man with short-term memory loss uses notes and tattoos to hunt the killer of his wife working backwards in time.

title: Whiplash
description: A young drummer at a top music conservatory pushes himself to his limits under the brutally demanding conductor.

title: La La Land
description: A jazz musician and an aspiring actress fall in love in Los Angeles but their dreams begin to pull them apart.

title: Joker
description: The origin story of Arthur Fleck a failed comedian who slowly descends into madness and becomes the Joker.
Two British soldiers are sent on a dangerous mission through enemy territory to deliver a message that could save 1600 lives.

title: Parasite
description: A poor family schemes to become employed by a wealthy family and things take a dark unexpected turn.

title: Get Out
description: A Black man visits his white girlfriend's family estate and uncovers a disturbing secret hidden beneath their seemingly welcoming behavior.

title: Hereditary
description: After the death of her secretive mother a woman and her family are haunted by dark and terrifying secrets.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
description: A famous concierge and his protege become embroiled in a murder mystery involving stolen paintings and a family fortune.

title: Mad Max Fury Road
description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland a woman rebels against a tyrant and flees across the desert with a group of female prisoners.

title: Baby Driver
description: A young getaway driver finds himself forced to work for a crime boss but romance and loyalty complicate his escape plan.

title: Knives Out
description: A detective investigates the death of a wealthy crime novelist after his entire dysfunctional family gathers for his birthday.

title: Coco
description: A young boy accidentally travels to the Land of the Dead and learns his family history while searching for his musician ancestor.

title: Soul
description: A jazz musician accidentally gets separated from his soul before a big performance and must find his way back to his body.

title: Your Name
description: Two teenagers who have never met begin switching bodies and must find each other before a comet threatens their lives.

title: Spirited Away
description: A 10-year-old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods and witches and must find a way to free her transformed parents.

title: Princess Mononoke
description: A prince becomes embroiled in a conflict between forest gods and an industrializing mining town that threatens nature.
